name: @freeside-auth/identity-client
description: Typed HTTP client for identity-api — source-distributed (NOT npm). Consumers vendor this package's src/ tree into their own repo (shadcn-style 'add' pattern) per PRD v3.0 §11 post-verify lock-ins. See README.md §Vendoring.
